titleStmt.title: SII 17.592: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 592. (A.R. No. 547 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription commences with the Praśasti pūmaruviya poruppēḻum, etc., and stops in the middle.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmaruviya (poḻileḻum) poruppeḻum puṉainittalattāma neṭuṅkuṭai poḻinta tavaḷa veṇ ṇilākku ra potiyac cuṭaṟ cakkaraveṟpiṟ ṟaṉanaṭaic cakkaram veyileṟippac ciṉappuliyuñ ceṅkolu manaittuyiṟkkuṅ kāval pūṇap pa ya ṇamicaip parañcoti pāṟkaṭal niṉṟeḻuntaruḷi maṇineṭu muṭi �vittāneṉa maṇmaṭantaiyaikkaip piṭittu malarmaṭantai maṇiyāra varaimārviṟ kuṭivāḻa pula maṭantai koḻunaṉākip por maṭantaiyai maṇam puṇarntu paruti mutaṟ kulam viḷaṅkac curutikaḷ
ṉave raruḷ vāyppa viḻunta Aṟi camaiyattai A ḷeṭut tātiyukaṅ koḻuntu viṭṭut taḻaittoṅkak komātaṟaṅ kuḷirtūṅka māri vāyttu vaḷañ curakkat tāraṇi yor piṇi niṅka nallor taṅkaṟpuyara nāṉmaṟaiyor tuṟai vaḷara Ellārun tanitta ṉiyey vāḻntaṉam yāmeṉa makiḻṉtu Oruvaruṭaṉ Oruvaṟkum Oṉṟiṉuṭaṉ Oṉṟukku varupakai yakattiṉṟi viḻaintu kātaluṭaṉcera Intiraṉ mutaṟticāpālar Eṇmaru moru vaṭivāki vantapaṭiyeṉa niṉṟu maṉuvāṇai taṉi naṭāttiya pāṭiyāṉaiye piṇippuṇpaṉa vaṭimaṇiccilampe yaraṟṟuvaṉa celoṭaiyey kalakku
ṇpaṉa māvey vaṭuppaṭuvaṉa māmalarey kaṭīyavāyiṉa varupuṉaley ciṟaippaṭuvaṉa kāvukaḷey koṭiyavāyiṉa kaḷḷuṇpaṉa vaṇṭukaḷey poyyuṭaiyaṉa varaiveyey pormalaivaṉa Eḻukaḻaṉiye maiyyuṭaiyaṉa neṭuvaraiye maruḷuṭaiyaṉa Iṉamāṉkaḷey kayaṟkulamey piṟantoḻukuṅ kaittāyarey kaṭintoṟuppār Iyaṟpulavarey poruḷ vaippār Icaippāṇarey kūṭañ ceyvār Eṉṟu kūṟi Ivaṉ kākkun tirunā ṭṭiṉiyal vituveṉa ṉiṉṟu kāval neṟipūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉaiyātu tantaiyil lor tantaiyākiyun tāyarillor tāyarākiyu maintaril lorumaintarākiyum
maṉṉuyirkaṭ kuyirākiyum viḻipeṟṟa payaṉeṉṉavu mey peṟṟa Aruḷeṉṉavumo ḻi poruḷeṉṉavu mukam peṟṟa paṉuvaleṉṉavum Ettuṟaikkum Iṟaivaṉeṉṉa vu yāñ ceyThis inscription is unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 17.592 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
